nasb.text: And when the men of that place recognized Him, they sent word into all that surrounding district and brought to Him all who were sick;

esv.text: And when the men of that place recognized him, they sent around to all that region and brought to him all who were sick

cnv.text: 那地的人認出是耶穌，就把消息傳遍了那一帶。眾人把一切有病的人都帶來，

ccb.text: 当地的人认出是耶稣，就派人去把附近所有的病人都带到祂面前，

csbs.text: 那里的人一认出是耶稣，就派人到周围整个地区，把所有患病的都带到耶稣那里，
